problem_id: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
team_name: ClearBid — AI-Based Tender Evaluation for Government Procurement
summary: Design a technical platform that evaluates tenders, understands each bidder, evaluates eligibility, and produces explainable evaluation reports for government procurement officers.
key_steps: Explanation of every verdict at criterion level
Human review interface and audit trail
optimization_claims: Confidence calibration using Platt Scaling and Isotonic Regression
Fraud signal handling through metadata consistency checks, statistical image analysis, font anomaly detection, and digital signature chain validation
constraints_addressed: No standard format or consistent structure in tender documents
